name: Spiced Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper, cored, seeded and diced
1 small waxy potato, peeled and diced
5 sprigs parsley (tied together with kitchen string)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup kettle, heat olive oil and butter over low heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 to 7 minutes.
2. Increase heat to medium. Add carrots and stir-cook for 1 minute. Add celery and stir-cook for 1 minute. Add green pepper and stir-cook for 1 minute.
3. Add diced potato, cumin, chili powder, and allspice; stir-cook for 1 minute.
4. Add herb bundle, lentils, and chicken broth. Bring to a boil, then boil for 1 minute.
5. Cover and simmer until lentils are tender (about 1 hour).
6. Season with salt and freshly-ground black pepper to taste. Discard parsley-bay leaf bundle.
7. Serve hot in warm bowls. Makes 4 to 5 servings.
